_meta.doc: Single source of truth for the locale roster (HANDOFF-10 Job 1). Every builder, the picker, and hreflang derive the language list + endonym + direction from here via scripts/locales.py — no hardcoded LANGS anywhere. Adding a language is a data edit + render, not a multi-file hunt.

status_model.published: Complete tree (homepage + 15 localized-slug hubs + communes + all fiches), present in sitemap + hreflang + the language picker. The live originals.
status_model.staged-indexable: Marquee pilot (~20 pages): indexable + self-canonical, OWN URLs listed in sitemap.xml, but NOT in any hreflang cluster and NOT in the picker. pl/pt/cs since PR #15 (2026-06-30) — the GSC clock (HANDOFF-11).
status_model.staged: Pilot rendered noindex: absent from sitemap, hreflang, and picker. (No language currently in this state.)
status_model.held: Vocabulary-verified but render-blocked (RTL engine + native spot-check pending). No rendered tree; absent from sitemap, hreflang, and picker. ar/he.

_meta.provenance_note: Translation provenance (the `reviewed` method string + its clean verify report) is owned SOLELY by data/i18n-labels.json under gate_i18n_labels.py. It is deliberately NOT duplicated here. gate_locale_status.py cross-validates that each language's `status` is consistent with that single source.

render_roster_derivation.published_all: status == published, in declared order (fr first) — the 6-language hreflang/breadcrumb/intent-hub roster.
render_roster_derivation.secondary: published minus root (fr) — the en/de/it/es/nl subdirectory roster used by build_site, build_hubs, fix_hreflang_sitemap, build_catalog_index, ingest_translations, gate_canonical_selfref.
render_roster_derivation.staged_indexable: status == staged-indexable — deployed to _site + own sitemap URLs, never picker/hreflang.
